name: Basic Item Processing

pages.text: Let $(item)Anvil$() fall on the specific blocks to process the items inside or on. Different specific blocks have different processing. The flowing pages of this entry will introduce relevant content in sequence. This mod adds a block that prevents hit items from flying around due to hitbox squeezing: $(item)Stamping Platform$().
The iron pressure plate can be replaced with an iron plate for any mod.

pages.name: Item Stamping
pages.text: When the stamping platform is below, the item stamping is performed, and both materials and products are on the stamping platform. Detailed instructions on the right.

Items can be stamped into slices, such as Iron Ingotâ†’Iron Pressure Plate; Gold Ingotâ†’Gold Pressure Plate; Snowballâ†’Snow; Cherry Leavesâ†’Pink Petals.$(br)It is also possible to separate the different components of some items, such as Sugar Caneâ†’Paper+Sugar; Wheatâ†’Wheat Flour+Wheat Seeds; Logâ†’Wood Fiber+Resin.$(br)Some equipment can also be recycled. Chains, gold, iron and diamond tools, weapons and armors can be broken down into much more materials than they are smelted.

pages.name: Item Compression
pages.text: When the cauldron is below, the item compression is performed, and both materials and products are in the cauldron. Detailed instructions on the right.

If the item as a 2 x 2 or 3 x 3 crafting recipe, it will be executed, e.g. 9 Iron Nuggetsâ†’1 Iron Ingot; 9 Iron Ingotsâ†’1 Iron Block; 4 Stringsâ†’1 White Wool. If an item can be crafted both 2 x 2 and 3 x 3, 3 x 3 crafting will be performed.$(br)In addition to the vanilla recipes: 3 Bonesâ†’1 Bone block.

pages.name: Item Decomposition
pages.text: When the iron trapdoor is below, the item decomposition is performed. The materials are on the iron trapdoor and products are under theiron trapdoor. Detailed instructions on the right.

If the item has a 1â†’n crafting recipe, it will be executed, e.g. 1 Iron Ingotâ†’9 Iron Nuggets.$(br)In addition, the vanilla decomposition by breaking blocks can also be performed here, and the amount is the largest. For example, 1 Melonâ†’9 Melon Slices; 1 Snow Blockâ†’4 Snowballs; 1 Glowstoneâ†’ 4 Glowstone Dust, Clayâ†’4 Clay Balls.$(br)Some building blocks that vanilla cannot disassemble can also be broken down in this way. For example, 1 Quartz Blockâ†’4 Quartzs; 1 Amethyst Blockâ†’4 Amethyst Sharts; 1 Dripstone Blockâ†’4 Pointed Dripstone; 1 Honeycomb Blockâ†’4 Honeycomb; 1 Prismarineâ†’4 Prismarine Shards; 1 Prismarine Bricksâ†’9 Prismarine Shards.

pages.name: Items Sifting
pages.text: When the scaffolding is below, the items sifting is performed. The materials are on the scaffolding and products are under the scaffolding. Detailed instructions on the right.

About half of the additional material is produced through sifting, which can be recycled. The conversion table is as follows (probability of existence):$(br)Gravelâ†’Flint+Iron Nugget$(br)Sandâ†’Clay+Gold Nugget$(br)Red Sandâ†’Glowstone Dust+Copper Nugget$(br)Cineriteâ†’Lapis Lazuli+Zinc Nugget$(br)Quartz Sandâ†’Quartz+Tin Nugget$(br)Deepslate Chipsâ†’Lime Powder+Lead Nugget$(br)Nether Dustâ†’Redstone Dust+Tungsten Nugget$(br)Black Sandâ†’Gunpowder+Silver Nugget$(br)End Dustâ†’Chorus Flowers+Titanium Nugget$(br)Soul Sandâ†’Nether Wart$(br)Leavesâ†’Corresponding Sapling

pages.name: Item Bulging
pages.text: When the water cauldron is below, the item bulging is performed, and both materials and products are in the cauldron. Detailed instructions on the right.
Dirtâ†’Clay$(br)Crimson Fungusâ†’Nether Wart Block$(br)Warped Fungusâ†’Warped Wart Block$(br)Spider Eyeâ†’ Fermented Spider Eye$(br)Coralâ†’Corresponding Coral Block.

pages.name: Cooking
pages.text: When the cauldron and the campfire is below, the cooking is performed, and both materials and products are in the cauldron.  A few recipes require water and consume a layer of water. Detailed instructions on the right.

pages: Auto-compatible with all smoker recipes and campfire recipes, no water required.$(br)In the presence of water, the following transformations can occur: Resinâ†’Slime Ball.
